criteria.label: Empathy & Acknowledgement
criteria.good: Agent acknowledges and empathizes in first response.
criteria.bad: Agent ignores sentiment or blames the customer.

criteria.label: Accuracy & Policy
criteria.good: Agent provides correct info, follows guardrails.
criteria.bad: Misstates policy or suggests unsupported actions.

criteria.label: Structure
criteria.good: Serve → Solve → Close present in the flow.
